description: Product Description Stretch Ear Loops & Snug Fit Stretch ear loops allow for the perfect fit. Simple design paired with easy on loops allow for easy on and off with the StepAhead washable face mask. Constructed from three layers of high quality fabric, the StepAhead reusable face mask is water resistant and breathable. Three Layers of Fabric - Water Resistant Constructed from three layers of high quality fabric, the StepAhead reusable face mask is water resistant and breathable. The tightly woven middle layer serves to keep out anything floating in the wearer's surroundings, while still allowing for unrestricted breathing. Lay Flat Seams Durable and strong, the mask's lay flat seams, create a snug fit across the bridge of the nose and cheeks, and secure the mask below the chin. The soft materials allow for breathing and talking comfortably while wearing the face mask. Washable fabric for excellent protection Soft elastic ear loop for comfort High filtration - filters dust, pollen and air Easy breathability Washable and reusable Suitable for sensitive skin One size fits all Care and Cleaning Made with machine washable materials, the protective mask can be washed after use. No more wasteful throw away masks!
